text:
CLINICAL HISTORY:  Patient fell onto right ribs.  The patient also on anticoagulants.

CHEST AP:

The heart and mediastinum are normal.  The lung fields are clear.  No effusion or pneumothorax is present.

No rib fracture is seen on limited views.

Vascular stent is seen within the lower SVC, position unchanged.

IMPRESSION:  No pneumothorax.  No effusion.  No rib fracture identified.
